h52e6fc6cgcf29g4ac2g8eabg95100cf53f26: You got our little girl home safe, and I can rest easy knowing we won't be turned out on our backsides. I can't say thanks enough.
h86358213gd1b7g4386g902cg213c6852be9b: We can prepare for the journey to Baldur's Gate in peace now.
h4e688affg8e89g4bc2g8175g327e1cad44a9: The road to Baldur's Gate looks a little less daunting now that we're all back together.
hc8a499f2g3eb2g4ca4g9a42ga0c6826dc7bd: Arabella has behaved herself - so far. A miracle in itself. Thank you again.
h32d70194g2d3eg4acegab99g210abb625895: I am not a violent man. But lying to us about Arabella?
h6d6986d8g76dag4bb9g9b6agcc6fe6ab157c: Get out of my sight. For your own good.
h6ac9410eg3712g4965g8d05gc5d426eaf1a9: All Arabella wanted to do is help. But you and half the grove stood by and let her die - alone.
hbe458621gf8d6g428ag85b0g153463da1929: Everyone is so excited about leaving now. But without Arabella - it doesn't matter. None of it matters.
